whatIs.a: Salafi Durus is a platform for authentic Islamic audio lectures from trusted scholars following the Salafi methodology.

saveLectures.q: How do I save lectures for later?
saveLectures.a: Tap the bookmark icon on any lecture to add it to your Library. You can access saved lectures from the Library tab.

offline.a: Yes — download lectures using the download button on the lecture detail screen. Downloaded lectures are available without an internet connection.

followScholar.q: How do I follow a scholar?
followScholar.a: Visit a scholar's profile and tap Follow. New lectures from followed scholars appear in your Feed.

responseTime.a: We aim to respond within 48 hours.

library.title: My Library
library.emptyProgress: No lectures started yet. Browse the catalog to begin listening.
library.emptySaved: No saved lectures yet. Save lectures to keep track of them.
library.emptyCompleted: No completed lectures yet. Finish lectures to track your learning.
library.authProgressTitle: Sign in to view your progress
library.authProgressDesc: Start listening to lectures and track your progress
library.authSavedTitle: Sign in to view saved lectures
library.authSavedDesc: Save lectures to revisit them later
library.authCompletedTitle: Sign in to view completed history

feed.empty: No lectures available in this feed.
feed.followingEmpty: Follow scholars to see their latest lectures here.

hero.taglineTranslation: Say: 'Are those who know equal to those who do not know?' It is only men of understanding who will remember

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.desktop: We collect information you provide when creating an account (email, display name) and usage data such as listening history and saved lectures. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
collect.mobile: We collect information you provide when creating an account and usage data such as listening history. We do not sell your personal information.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.desktop: Your information is used to provide and improve the service, personalize your experience (e.g., resume playback, recommendations), and communicate important updates about the platform.
use.mobile: Your information is used to provide the service, personalize your experience, and communicate important updates.

storage.title: Data Storage & Security
storage.desktop: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. Audio files are served via secure, time-limited URLs. We retain your data only as long as your account is active.
storage.mobile: Your data is stored securely with industry-standard encryption. We retain your data only while your account is active.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desktop: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@salafidurus.com.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.desktop: By accessing or using Salafi Durus, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
acceptance.mobile: By using Salafi Durus, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

use.title: Use of the Service
use.desktop: Salafi Durus provides access to Islamic audio lectures for personal, non-commercial use. You may not redistribute, modify, or commercially exploit the content without explicit permission from the content owners.
use.mobile: Content is for personal, non-commercial use. Do not redistribute or commercially exploit the content.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.desktop: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
accounts.mobile: You are responsible for your account credentials and all activity under your account.

property.title: Content & Intellectual Property
property.desktop: All audio content is provided by scholars and remains their intellectual property. The platform design, code, and branding are owned by Salafi Durus.
property.mobile: Audio content belongs to the scholars. Platform design and code belong to Salafi Durus.

termination.title: Termination
termination.text: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time from your account settings.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desktop: For questions about these terms, contact legal@salafidurus.com.
